# Pedro Franceschi

> Co-founder and CEO of Brex. Brazilian entrepreneur who moved to the US to build at scale.

## Compiled Truth

Pedro Franceschi is the co-founder and CEO of Brex, the corporate card and financial infrastructure company for startups and enterprises.

## Timeline

- **2017** | founding — Co-founded Brex with Henrique Dubugras
- **2024** | milestone — Brex reached $500M ARR
